channel.title: Nuno Dias's Web Page
channel.description: Recent content on Nuno Dias's Web Page

item.title: It's all about Choice, until someone gets lucid #6
item.description: I am lying in my bed, half awake, half asleep, when suddenly, an image appears, ripping trough the darkness of my closed eyes, expanding… It’s dark again, and short moment goes by, when another image flashes in my head, and another, and another, repeatedly followed by darkness. Gradually, I realize that these look super real and seem easy to maintain. Intuitively, I use this realization to transition into a dream, lucid.

item.title: Apps
item.description: I built these for the companies I worked for. For my personal projects click here. 2018 // 4S Mobile Swift Rx C# .NET Web Api SQL Server Sketch An iOS app that provides unified access to Finsolutia’s suite of applications by various stakeholders, such as Asset Managers, Investors, Vendors, etc. The app provides policy based access and user defined customization for on-screen needs on the platform’s loan, property and vendor modules.

item.title: Resume
item.description: Nuno Manuel Dias I have interacted with a wide-range of technologies. I am experienced in some and I specialized around native iOS development with Swift. I have roots in graphic design. Recent collaborations 2014 - ∞ // Position Senior Mobile Developer // Company Finsolutia Responsabilities Perform user research, design, architect, develop, distribute and maintain a large set of iOS and Android mobile apps. 2013 - 2014 // Position Information Systems Consultant // Company Aubay Responsabilities

item.title: About
item.description: Hi, here’s the gist about me: My friends call me Nuno. Mostly because that’s my name. I am the son of a witch and I’ve been flying without a broom since I can remember. I enjoy long walks on the beach, but will spend most time in the water. I am very deep. 🤔 Oh, and I also do some mobile oriented, software engineering. Check out my resume if you’d like to know more.

item.title: It's all Games & Wars, until someone gets lucid #5
item.description: I seem to be moving fast […] I’m exchanging fire with an alien entity! It’s an open, Mars like environment. There are shades of red all around. I feel like I’m in a game, with game characters, like it’s a first person shooter of some sort. I can move around quickly, and dodge long distances while in confrontation. unsplash-logo photo by Yuliya Kosolapova Everything looks close to waking reality now

item.title: Personal projects
item.description: These are a few of my projects. I also built some apps for the companies I worked for, check them out in here. 2017 - ∞ // DefaultsKit An open source framework that leverages Swift’s Codable capabilities to provide a Strongly Typed wrapper, on top of UserDefaults, for iOS, macOS and tvOS. Get DefaultsKit on github. 2017 - ∞ // InfoKit An open source framework that provides Strongly Typed access to the Info.
